citations.narrative:
A complete perimeter fence was not present for the newly constructed outdoor squirrel enclosure. The outdoor facility has
existing perimeter fencing, however the gates are continuously left open to allow for foot traffic as well as cars to enter this
part of the campus. This could allow animals as well as unwanted persons to access the animal housing area. All outdoor
housing facilities must be enclosed by a perimeter fence, which for squirrel species, must be no less than 6 feet high. The
facility must correct this issue.
****** Correct by June 1, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
n

narrative:
3.127(d) 
   
Facilities, outdoor. 
A complete perimeter fence was not present for the newly constructed outdoor squirrel enclosure. The outdoor facility has 
existing perimeter fencing, however the gates are continuously left open to allow for foot traffic as well as cars to enter this 
part of the campus. This could allow animals as well as unwanted persons to access the animal housing area. All outdoor 
housing facilities must be enclosed by a perimeter fence, which for squirrel species, must be no less than 6 feet high. The 
facility must correct this issue.  
****** Correct by June 1, 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative. 
 
 n
